summary: .nojekyll just locked in after the Pages stale-build incident. Two over-cap apps still lack renditions, file-chunker was corrupted mid-session, and two root stragglers are sitting in the tree.

findings.body: repo-auditor.md and canary.txt both present and don't belong.
file-chunker corrupted 4x this session via create_or_update_file. Read path clips at ~30KB.
findings.fix: Byte-safe upload via UI only; never push over-cap source.

findings.body: app-dashboard and world-cup-bracket over soft cap without renditions.
Chunk index naming inconsistent across apps.
